name: Uninstall-PSResource

options.name: -Name
options.description: Name of a resource or resources to remove. Wildcards are supported but NuGet only accepts the `*` character.

options.name: -Prerelease
options.description: Indicates that only prerelease version resources should be removed.

options.name: -Scope
options.description: Specifies the scope of the resource to uninstall.

options.name: -SkipDependencyCheck
options.description: By default, the cmdlet checks to see whether the resource being removed is a dependency for another resource. Using this parameter skips the dependency test.

options.name: -Version
options.description: Specifies the version of the resource to be removed. The value can be an exact version or a version range using the NuGet versioning syntax.

name: -Confirm
-cf
options.description: Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.

name: -WhatIf
-wi
options.description: Shows what would happen if the cmdlet runs. The cmdlet isn't run.

description: Uninstalls a resource that was installed using PowerShellGet .
